lyrics.text: I am lonely lonely lonely
lyrics.translation: 我是那么，那么，那么孤独

lyrics.text: I am lonely lonely in my life
lyrics.translation: 我的生命中是那么，那么孤独

lyrics.text: I am lonely lonely lonely
lyrics.translation: 我那么，那么，那么孤独

lyrics.text: God help me help me to survive!
lyrics.translation: 上帝呀拯救我，助佑我活下去！

lyrics.text: Remember first time we met day one
lyrics.translation: 还记得我们初遇的那一天

lyrics.text: Kids in the garden' playin' games heaven' fun
lyrics.translation: 孩子们在花园里玩着开心的游戏

lyrics.text: Excitin' and amazin' havin' a real friend of mine
lyrics.translation: 有一个知心朋友令我激动惊异

lyrics.text: Feel my heart and for real I am blind
lyrics.translation: 情感真实的悸动蒙蔽住了我双眼

lyrics.text: Face to face and eye to eye
lyrics.translation: 面对面，眼对眼

lyrics.text: Usin' our hands to buy and supply
lyrics.translation: 用我们的双手去交换和补偿

lyrics.text: Chillin' is cool from January to June
lyrics.translation: 从严寒的一月到凉爽的六月

lyrics.text: And we still sticked together like the glue
lyrics.translation: 我们依然在一起，如胶似漆

lyrics.text: You know the rules
lyrics.translation: 我们知道游戏规则

lyrics.text: Forever you and I and believe it was clear
lyrics.translation: 你和我永远相信，明显而清晰

lyrics.text: If I ever should fall I could count on you with no fear
lyrics.translation: 假如我倒下去，我能毫无畏惧依靠你

lyrics.text: Runnin' out of time I see who's fake
lyrics.translation: 日久见人心

lyrics.text: Alone without protection from all them snakes
lyrics.translation: 在那帮毒蛇面前孤独地失去防护

lyrics.text: All for one one for all I was told
lyrics.translation: 我被他们告知“人人为我，我为人人”

lyrics.text: Black white yellow no matter if your young or old
lyrics.translation: “无论肤色是黑、白、黄，年轻或年老的”

lyrics.text: Nana's in the house to let you know
lyrics.translation: NaNa站在这里，让你明白

lyrics.text: What I see is how I feel and damn
lyrics.translation: 我何所见是我的感受和诅咒，我孤独

lyrics.text: I am lonely lonely lonely
lyrics.translation: 我是那么，那么，那么孤独

lyrics.text: I am lonely lonely in my life
lyrics.translation: 我的生命中是那么，那么孤独

lyrics.text: I am lonely lonely lonely
lyrics.translation: 我那么，那么，那么孤独

lyrics.text: God help me help me to survive!
lyrics.translation: 上帝呀拯救我，助佑我活下去！

lyrics.text: Everybody's trippin' on me
lyrics.translation: 所有人使我跌倒

lyrics.text: Oh lord come help me please
lyrics.translation: 啊，主请快来拯救我

lyrics.text: I did some bad things in my life
lyrics.translation: 我在生命中弄糟了一些事

lyrics.text: Why can't you rescue me 'cause you've got all I need
lyrics.translation: 为什么你不能拯救我？既然你已知晓我所需要

lyrics.text: I know I got to pay the price
lyrics.translation: 我知道了：我必须付出代价

lyrics.text: That's why I am lonely lonely lonely
lyrics.translation: 这就是为什么我那么，那么，那么孤独

lyrics.text: I am so lonely lonely
lyrics.translation: 我多么孤独，孤独

lyrics.text: That's why I am lonely lonely lonely
lyrics.translation: 这就是为什么我那么，那么，那么孤独

lyrics.text: Creepin' thru the streets at night after a fuss and fight
lyrics.translation: 窸窣细响穿过晚街，在一场忧虑与斗争之后

lyrics.text: Tears in my eyes I'm a man lookin' for the light
lyrics.translation: 我热泪盈眶，是一个寻找光明的人

lyrics.text: Dark is the path I know he will rescue me
lyrics.translation: 黑暗乃必经之路，我知道祂将拯救我

lyrics.text: The lord is my shephard I'm cool despite emergency
lyrics.translation: 主是我的牧羊人，我心如止水，尽管危机四伏

lyrics.text: Whom shall I fear except the god
lyrics.translation: 除了上帝我谁都不怕

lyrics.text: Thank you for the blessin' and the skills on the mic
lyrics.translation: 感谢你保佑并赐予我麦克风的娴熟技巧

lyrics.text: Five years we know there's no dignity
lyrics.translation: 五年来我们心知肚明那里不存在尊严

lyrics.text: Free at last see the light in me
lyrics.translation: 获得自由，终将看到我焕发灵魂之光

lyrics.text: What goes up must come down
lyrics.translation: 凡高的，必降为卑

lyrics.text: I'll be around while you heading towards deathtown
lyrics.translation: 我将在周围相伴，当你向死亡之城前进

lyrics.text: Always look forward hardly never look back
lyrics.translation: 总要坚定向前看，永远不回头

lyrics.text: So many tears and the snakes on my jock
lyrics.translation: 如此多泪与毒蛇将我纠缠！

lyrics.text: Now I'm riding in my big fat ride
lyrics.translation: 现在，我骑着满载的车

lyrics.text: Your ass is late so look for the line
lyrics.translation: 你迟到了，就滚去排队

lyrics.text: Nana in the house to let you know
lyrics.translation: NaNa站在这里，让你明白

lyrics.text: What I see is how I feel so leave me alone
lyrics.translation: 我何所见是我的感受和诅咒，所以离我远点

lyrics.text: I am lonely lonely lonely
lyrics.translation: 我是那么，那么，那么孤独

lyrics.text: I am lonely lonely in my life
lyrics.translation: 我的生命中是那么，那么孤独

lyrics.text: I am lonely lonely lonely
lyrics.translation: 我那么，那么，那么孤独

lyrics.text: God help me help me to survive!
lyrics.translation: 上帝呀拯救我，助佑我活下去！

lyrics.text: Everybody is trippin' on me
lyrics.translation: 所有人使我跌倒

lyrics.text: Oh lord come help me please
lyrics.translation: 啊，主请快来拯救我

lyrics.text: I did some bad things in my life
lyrics.translation: 我在生命中弄糟了一些事

lyrics.text: Why can't you rescue me
lyrics.translation: 为什么你不能拯救我

lyrics.text: cause you've got all I need
lyrics.translation: 既然你已知晓我所需要

lyrics.text: I know I got to pay the price
lyrics.translation: 我知道了：我必须付出代价

lyrics.text: Knock on my door whom you lookin' for
lyrics.translation: 敲我的门，你要找谁

lyrics.text: A dream or reality enemies at my door
lyrics.translation: 是一场梦还是真实的敌人在我门边

lyrics.text: Eyes I realize it's fantasize I must be high
lyrics.translation: 双眼让我意识到这是幻觉，我一定太激动了

lyrics.text: So let me live before I die
lyrics.translation: 所以在我死之前让我再快活一回

lyrics.text: Grasp the bottle twist the cap to survive
lyrics.translation: 再一次我抓起酒瓶卷起帽子去生存

lyrics.text: Your life is yours my life is mine
lyrics.translation: 你的生活是你的，我的生活是我的

lyrics.text: No emotions in this world full of lies
lyrics.translation: 这个充满谎言的世界不存在情感

lyrics.text: Step by step and be versatile
lyrics.translation: 步步为营，随机应变

lyrics.text: Love peace and crash that's what it's all about
lyrics.translation: 热爱和平或毁灭，这关乎一切

lyrics.text: Alone by yourself than you lack there's no doubt about
lyrics.translation: 独自一人比你匮乏得不懂怀疑要好

lyrics.text: I'm always into something making moves to improve
lyrics.translation: 我通常沉湎某件事，就采取行动去改进

lyrics.text: What would you do if you where in my shoes
lyrics.translation: 你将做什么？如果你是我？

lyrics.text: Boom a letter oops another suicide
lyrics.translation: 砰！一封信！哎呀——又一个者

lyrics.text: Meet me for a ride at the boulevard
lyrics.translation: 在林荫大道与我约见，开启一段旅程

lyrics.text: Nana's in the house to let you know
lyrics.translation: NaNa站在这里，让你明白

lyrics.text: What I see is how I feel and damn
lyrics.translation: 我何所见是我的感受和诅咒，我孤独
